questionHtml: Outline how ranitidine (Zantac) inhibits stomach acid production.
markschemeHtml:
blocks/binds H2/histamine receptors «in cells of stomach lining»
OR
prevents histamine molecules binding to H2/histamine receptors «and triggering acid secretion»  [✔]

meta.title: Outline how ranitidine (Zantac) inhibits stomach acid production.
